No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. APPEARANCES - ATTY. SONJA M. DAHL OF DONNELLY NELSON DEPOLO & MURRAY, TEL. NO. (925) 287-8181
APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA and SIGURD BERVEN, M.D.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Granted. Defendant has met its burden of persuasion that one or more elements of professional negligence cannot be established. No opposition filed. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
